allow: Bash(find /usr /opt /Applications -name "node" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5; find /Users/sarthaktyagi -name "node" -maxdepth 6 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -5)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -NoExit -Command "Set-Location ''c:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\Ccentrik-CRM-main\\frontend''; Write-Host ''Starting frontend \(Vite\) on port 5173...''; npm run dev"' -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $b5000 = netstat -ano | Select-String "0.0.0.0:5000|127.0.0.1:5000"; $b5173 = netstat -ano | Select-String "0.0.0.0:5173|127.0.0.1:5173"; "Port 5000 \(backend\): $\(if\($b5000\){'LISTENING'}else{'not yet up'}\)"; "Port 5173 \(frontend\): $\(if\($b5173\){'LISTENING'}else{'not yet up'}\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $all = netstat -ano; $b = $all | Select-String ":5000"; $f = $all | Select-String ":5173"; "5000 matches: $\($b.Count\)"; "5173 matches: $\($f.Count\)"; $b | Select-Object -First 3; $f | Select-Object -First 3)
PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; where.exe node 2>$null; $env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|npm" })

PowerShell($machinePath = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); $env:PATH = "$machinePath;" + $env:PATH; try { $b = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "Backend  :5000 — HTTP $\($b.StatusCode\) — $\($b.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$b.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "Backend  :5000 — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 4; "Frontend :5173 — HTTP $\($f.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend :5173 — $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $j = Get-Content 'c:\\Users\\Admin\\Downloads\\Ccentrik-CRM-main\\.claude\\settings.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "JSON valid"; "Hook command: $\($j.hooks.PostToolUse[0].hooks[0].command\)" } catch { "JSON ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($machinePath = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); $env:PATH = "$machinePath;" + $env:PATH; try { $b = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Backend  :5000 HTTP $\($b.StatusCode\) - $\($b.Content\)" } catch { "Backend  :5000 DOWN - $_" }; try { $f = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Frontend :5173 HTTP $\($f.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Frontend :5173 DOWN - $_" })
